title: Force Crawl
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5771873d2b89925d5ac3ed1a3a6e465e6db4860f.webp) **
Use a key to control when you crawl.
** ### Controls: Caps Lock: Hold to manually crawl

### Settings: (Keybinds menu) Crawl Mode - "Toggle" (default) sets the key to be tapped to activate/deactivate crawling - "Hold" sets the key to be held to activate crawling

### Requirements: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-apihttp:// "Fabric API")
